summary: Iteration 5 testing complete - All 6 fixes verified working: (1) Slides advance automatically with useMemo fix, (2) Toast position is bottom-right, (3) Force refresh mechanism works with flag clear on heartbeat, (4) Auto-save slides without manual save, (5) Ticker management moved to 'Bandeau defilant' page, (6) Default transition dropdown in Settings > Diffusion. All 17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Slide content changes from Text to QR Code after ~8-10 seconds
useMemo stabilizes slides reference for proper timer behavior
Toast 'Diapo ajoutee' appears at x=1540, y=1002.5 on 1920x1080 viewport
Toaster component uses position='bottom-right' in AdminLayout.js
Heartbeat returns force_refresh=True when flag is set
Heartbeat clears force_refresh flag after reading (second call returns False)
Adding slide auto-saves to API without clicking Sauvegarder
updateAndSave helper in PlaylistEditor.js handles auto-save
Sidebar has 'Bandeau defilant' link with Newspaper icon
Sidebar shows: Tableau de bord, Ecrans, Mediatheque, Playlists, Bandeau defilant, Parametres
Settings page has: Logo, Couleurs, Tailles et dimensions, Diffusion, Apercu
NO ticker/RSS sections (moved to Ticker page)
Display endpoint returns default_transition in settings
Settings page has 'Transition par defaut' dropdown in Diffusion section
Playlist b085ffb2-a06f-4f8a-b01f-24c303ba8f87 has 3 slides (text 8s, qrcode 10s, countdown 12s)
seed_data_creation: Test slide temporarily added then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified 6 fixes: (1) useMemo in Display.js stabilizes slides array reference so useEffect timer works correctly - slides advance after duration. (2) Toaster uses position='bottom-right' - toast appears at x=1540, y=1002 on 1920x1080. (3) Force refresh: POST /api/screens/{id}/refresh sets force_refresh=True, heartbeat reads it and clears flag. Display.js checks force_refresh and calls window.location.reload(). (4) Auto-save: updateAndSave helper in PlaylistEditor.js calls savePlaylist after every slide add/edit/remove/toggle/duplicate. (5) Ticker page: /ticker route with TickerPage component - has speed slider, text items with toggle, RSS items with toggle. Settings page no longer has these sections. (6) Default transition: SettingsUpdate model has default_transition field, Settings.js Diffusion section has dropdown with fade/slide/random/none options. Display.js getTransClass uses settings.default_transition. Display code: 386621. Playlist ID: b085ffb2-a06f-4f8a-b01f-24c303ba8f87.
